problem.title: VGICP SLAM on KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)
problem.question: How does VGICP SLAM perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)?

variants.label: Default
variants.note: Voxel-GICP odometry with pose-graph optimization and ScanContext loop closure (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarsen registration and submap density while reducing keyframe and loop-closure frequency for faster pose-graph updates.
variants.note: Voxel-GICP odometry with pose-graph optimization and ScanContext loop closure (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Densify registration and submaps while revisiting keyframes and loop closure more aggressively.
variants.note: Voxel-GICP odometry with pose-graph optimization and ScanContext loop closure (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
